candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; equals Net sales in the preview and is the clearest total revenue line.
Also a direct top-line revenue label; useful as an alternate label if reporting changes across years.

variables.notes: Using a priority list of revenue labels, not summing them.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs in the income statement.

variables.notes: Selected the income statement cost line rather than balance sheet inventory-related rows.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row and it is populated, so per rules it should be selected alone rather than combining component buckets.
Overhead-related component, but not needed because an explicit populated SG&A line exists.
R&D label exists, but it appears below operating result and should not be added to SG&A from this presentation.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|misclassified. Per SG&A hierarchy, selected only the explicit populated SG&A row. Did not add Personnel expenses or Other operating costs because the explicit SG&A line exists. Did not add Research & Development because it appears below operating result, so including it in SG&A could misclassify/non-operating double count.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D label exists. It appears below operating result, so it can still be mapped to XRD but should not be added to SG&A.

variables.notes: Mapped the dedicated R&D line even though it appears below operating result; not included in XSGA_COMPONENTS due to placement rule.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on bank loans and overdrafts
candidates.why: Granular recurring interest expense line; preferred over broader Financial expenses.

candidates.why: Recurring lease-related interest cost; should be included with interest expense components.
Broader finance-cost bucket, but less preferred because granular interest components are available.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on bank loans and overdrafts
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest components and excluded the broader Financial expenses row to avoid double counting and inclusion of non-interest finance items.

candidates.why: Best available equity line; no separate parent/owners' equity line is shown.
Duplicate-equivalent equity label that may be used in some years; included as fallback priority.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line is present, so using total equity as BE. Therefore MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Correct concept for minority interest, but no values are shown and BE uses total equity; selecting both could double count.

variables.notes: Left empty because BE is mapped to Total Equity/Total equity; adding Non-controlling interests separately could double count. The preview does not show a distinct populated NCI amount.
